tagline: Get the best results from any AI platform

project_overview.description: A web application that transforms user intentions into optimized, platform-specific AI prompts
project_overview.problem_solved: Most users struggle to write effective prompts for AI platforms, leading to poor results and frustration
project_overview.solution: Intelligent prompt engineering service that understands each AI platform's unique requirements and generates tailored prompts

mvp_features.description: Dropdown to select target AI platform (ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, Gemini, etc.)
Text area where users describe what they want in plain language
AI-powered engine that generates optimized prompts based on platform and intent
Sign up/login to track usage for monetization

phase_2_features.description: Pre-built templates for common use cases
Users rate how well prompts worked to improve the system

phase_3_features.description: Track prompt performance and usage patterns

mvp_platforms.name: ChatGPT
mvp_platforms.optimization_focus: Clear instructions, role assignment, structured output format, examples

mvp_platforms.name: Claude
mvp_platforms.optimization_focus: XML tags, detailed context, thinking steps, constitutional AI principles

mvp_platforms.name: Midjourney
mvp_platforms.optimization_focus: Visual descriptors, aspect ratios, style parameters, negative prompts

mvp_platforms.name: Gemini
mvp_platforms.optimization_focus: Multimodal capabilities, structured data, clear task definition

mvp_platforms.name: Stable Diffusion
mvp_platforms.optimization_focus: Detailed descriptions, artistic styles, technical parameters, weights
